p.em: Single worker thread lifecycle — pool->lock held ▼ / released ▲

ol.li: pool->lock held at top of loop, in WOKEN, in DEQUEUING — NEVER in HANDLING
while (not if) around pthread_cond_wait — mandatory for spurious wakeup safety
work_item is value-copied (24 B) before unlock — no shared pointer after UNLOCKED
client_fd closed by handle_client_keep_alive before returning to WAITING
shutdown==1 && count>0 → still DEQUEUES (drains queue before exit)
pthread_cond_broadcast used in shutdown (not signal) — wakes ALL workers
